name: vibe-shuffle
description: Mood-adaptive music validation dashboard comparing Random Shuffle and Vibe Shuffle.

scripts.test: npm run test:expression && npm run test:physiology
scripts.paper: cd paper && latexmk -pdf -shell-escape -interaction=nonstopmode -halt-on-error -output-directory=build main.tex && cp build/main.pdf ../public/paper.pdf
scripts.flowcharts: cd docs && latexmk -pdf -interaction=nonstopmode -halt-on-error -output-directory=build flowcharts.tex && cp build/flowcharts.pdf flowcharts.pdf
